languages.text: Вечная огоня за ересью быстро обратила 32-ой полк друг против друга. Неизбывная паранойя вскоре разрушила полк изнутри, и армию фанатиков пришлось расформировать и распределить по прочим корпусам, дабы избежать братоубийственной резни.

The never-ending hunt for heretics quickly turned the 32nd Regiment against each other. Unrelenting paranoia soon destroyed the regiment from within, and the army of fanatics had to be disbanded and assigned to other corps to avoid a fratricidal massacre.
languages.original_text: Вечная огоня за ересью быстро обратила 32-ой полк друг против друга. Неизбывная паранойя вскоре разрушила полк изнутри, и армию фанатиков пришлось расформировать и распределить по прочим корпусам, дабы избежать братоубийственной резни.

traits.locale_text: The never-ending hunt for heretics quickly turned the 32nd Regiment against each other. Unrelenting paranoia soon destroyed the regiment from within, and the army of fanatics had to be disbanded and assigned to other corps to avoid a fratricidal massacre.

The never-ending hunt for heretics quickly turned the 32nd Regiment against each other. Unrelenting paranoia soon destroyed the regiment from within, and the army of fanatics had to be disbanded and assigned to other corps to avoid a fratricidal massacre.

The never-ending hunt for heretics quickly turned the 32nd Regiment against each other. Unrelenting paranoia soon destroyed the regiment from within, and the army of fanatics had to be disbanded and assigned to other corps to avoid a fratricidal massacre.

languages.text: 異端者狩りは終わりを知らなかった。32連隊は互いに敵対し、そのパラノイアは連隊を崩壊させた。狂信者の軍隊は内乱を避けるために解体され、他の軍団に配属された。
languages.original_text: The never-ending hunt for heretics quickly turned the 32nd Regiment against each other. Unrelenting paranoia soon destroyed the regiment from within, and the army of fanatics had to be disbanded and assigned to other corps to avoid a fratricidal massacre.

traits.locale_text: 異端者狩りは終わりを知らなかった。32連隊は互いに敵対し、その paranoiaは連隊を崩壊させた。狂信者の軍隊は内乱を避けるために解体され、他の軍団に配属された。

languages.text: 永无止境的异端搜捕很快让第32团的内部开始互相猜忌。无情的偏执迅速从内部摧毁了这支军团。为了避免自相残杀，这支狂热的军队最终只能解散，成员均被分配至其他部队。
languages.original_text: The never-ending hunt for heretics quickly turned the 32nd Regiment against each other. Unrelenting paranoia soon destroyed the regiment from within, and the army of fanatics had to be disbanded and assigned to other corps to avoid a fratricidal massacre.

traits.locale_text: 永无止境的异端搜捕很快让第32团的内部开始互相猜忌。无情的偏执迅速从内部摧毁了这支军团。为了避免自相残杀，这支狂热的军队最终只能解散，成员均被分配至其他部队。

languages.text: Dans l'interminable chasse aux hérétiques, les membres du 32e régiment ne tardèrent pas à se retourner les uns contre les autres. Détruite de l'intérieur par une paranoïa effrénée, l'armée de fanatiques dut être dissolue et affectée à d'autres corps afin d'éviter un massacre fratricide.
languages.original_text: The never-ending hunt for heretics quickly turned the 32nd Regiment against each other. Unrelenting paranoia soon destroyed the regiment from within, and the army of fanatics had to be disbanded and assigned to other corps to avoid a fratricidal massacre.

traits.locale_text: Dans l'interminable chasse aux hérétiques, les membres du 32e régiment ne tardèrent pas à se retourner les uns contre les autres. Détruite de l'intérieur par une paranoïa effrénée, l'armée de fanatiques dut être dissolue et affectée à d'autres corps afin d'éviter un massacre fratricide.

languages.text: La cacería sin fin de herejes no tardó en crear un fuerte conflicto interno en el 32.º regimiento. La paranoia continua lo destruyó desde el interior, y el ejército de fanáticos tuvo que disolverse y asignarse a otros batallones para evitar una masacre fratricida.
languages.original_text: The never-ending hunt for heretics quickly turned the 32nd Regiment against each other. Unrelenting paranoia soon destroyed the regiment from within, and the army of fanatics had to be disbanded and assigned to other corps to avoid a fratricidal massacre.

traits.locale_text: La cacería sin fin de herejes no tardó en crear un fuerte conflicto interno en el 32.º regimiento. La paranoia continua lo destruyó desde el interior, y el ejército de fanáticos tuvo que disolverse y asignarse a otros batallones para evitar una masacre fratricida.

languages.text: Bitmek bilmeyen kâfir avı, 32. Alay'ı hızla birbirine düşürdü. Acımasız paranoya çok geçmeden alayı içeriden yıktı ve fanatiklerden oluşan ordu, kardeş katliamını önlemek için dağıtılmak ve diğer kolordulara atanmak zorunda kaldı.
languages.original_text: The never-ending hunt for heretics quickly turned the 32nd Regiment against each other. Unrelenting paranoia soon destroyed the regiment from within, and the army of fanatics had to be disbanded and assigned to other corps to avoid a fratricidal massacre.

traits.locale_text: Bitmek bilmeyen kâfir avı, 32. Alay'ı hızla birbirine düşürdü. Acımasız paranoya çok geçmeden alayı içeriden yıktı ve fanatiklerden oluşan ordu, kardeş katliamını önlemek için dağıtılmak ve diğer kolordulara atanmak zorunda kaldı.

languages.text: Die endlose Jagd nach Ketzern brachte die Soldaten des 32. Regiments rasch gegeneinander auf. Bald zerstörte eine unablässige Paranoia das Regiment von innen heraus, und die Armee von Fanatikern musste aufgelöst und auf andere Kompanien verteilt werden, um einen Bruderkrieg zu verhindern.
languages.original_text: The never-ending hunt for heretics quickly turned the 32nd Regiment against each other. Unrelenting paranoia soon destroyed the regiment from within, and the army of fanatics had to be disbanded and assigned to other corps to avoid a fratricidal massacre.

Bald zerstörte eine unablässige Paranoia das Regiment von innen heraus, und die Armee von Fanatikern musste aufgelöst und auf andere Kompanien verteilt werden, um einen Bruderkrieg zu verhindern.
